default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sales coaching and alignment session between Marcel Santilli (CEO) and Tyler (new sales lead) covering strategy, tactical execution, and deal progress.](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tyler should leverage Marcel's LinkedIn presence/reputation for outreach until building his own, using a "Shadow Marcel" approach for prospects who don't know Marcel directly](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Current sweet spots for prospecting: software companies (especially security, fintech), SMB-focused platforms, companies competing with incumbents, and those who've recently raised Series A/B funding](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [The team's competitive advantage is their high-caliber team expertise (ex-Shopify, G2, TripAdvisor, etc.), platform with agentic capabilities, and Marcel's personal brand/community approach](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Need to focus on proactive and immediate follow-up after sales calls (same-day execution) with proper resources and collateral ready to go](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

## Topics

### Sales Identity & Approach Strategy

  - [Tyler should initially leverage Marcel's reputation by using "Shadow Marcel" email/LinkedIn for prospects who don't know Marcel directly](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [For existing relationships where Marcel is already in the conversation, Tyler can begin responding as himself once introduced](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Marcel's sales approach emphasizes: respect for prospect's time, heavy demo focus vs slides, personal storytelling, and creating urgency](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [A key differentiator is Marcel's personal brand and journey (CMO to CEO) that prospects connect with compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Plan to evolve Tyler's role into something community-focused as the AI-led growth community (Circle) develops](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile & Targeting

  - [Primary focus on software companies, especially in security (companies raising significant funding)](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Strong fits include: fintech companies, verticalized platforms, SMB-focused businesses (who can't rely solely on ads)](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Companies competing with established incumbents (Toast, Square, Webflow) who need content to compete](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Companies at Series A or B stage, particularly those who have raised in the last 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Companies with "heat scores" showing growth, rising headcount and likely to raise again soon](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Avoid: Series A companies that raised over a year ago in this market (likely struggling)](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)

### Competitive Positioning & Differentiation

  - [Main competitors: Graphite.io (agency), AirOps (platform that pivoted toward SEO/GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Key differentiators: elite team background (ex-Shopify, G2, TripAdvisor), platform capabilities, proven success with recognizable brands](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Platform advantage: agentic workflows vs deterministic - autonomous evaluation and improvement cycles](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Need to emphasize "garbage in, garbage out" and their strategic approach that combines speed with quality](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Plan to create slides showcasing team expertise and the logos/brands team members previously worked with](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [AirOps relationship evolved from partnership to competition after pricing conflict and their pivot to SEO/GEO](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

### Sales Process & Tactical Execution

  - [Need to organize sales collateral: create dedicated landing page for follow-up videos currently in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)
  - [Marcel will lead calls this week while Tyler observes, but need to be prepared for immediate follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Focus on fast execution: adding prospects to Slack, sharing kickoff availability, sending SOWs same-day](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Tyler should respond as himself once he's been introduced into email threads](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [For new outreach, coordinate with Dig (who manages Shadow Marcel) to avoid overlap in communication](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to immediately follow up with Plaid opportunity and book meeting this week](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Connect with Jason to organize sales collateral properly on website instead of Notion](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)
  - [Tyler to follow up with Zapier prospect and BCC the team](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [Respond to Samsara's request for workshop recording while pushing for a meeting with their content team](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Follow up with Braze to schedule next call after they complete reference calls with Mario](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3215.0)
  - [Coordinate with Dig on LinkedIn access and Shadow Marcel email usage](https://fathom.video/share/cE4qDtN3onnbsnzjyvyMDC_csEgz-AyZ?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

action_items.description: Coordinate w/ Digg re: accessing Marcel's LinkedIn via VPN
Respond to Plaid, book meeting this week
Send workshop recording to Samsara's Holly, push for intro w/ content team
Connect w/ Jason to publish follow-up video content on website/blog
WhatsApp David (HyperExponential) to schedule next call
Push for call w/ Braze post-Mario reference call
